concerns.text: FR-003 (compute additional invariants) is marked Phase 2+ exploratory but lacks explicit User Story traceability. While acknowledged as exploratory, all FRs should reference their originating story or be explicitly marked as 'exploratory extension' with story reference (e.g., 'exploratory extension of User Story 2').

FR-014 (filter to hyperbolic knots) is core to the research question but lacks explicit User Story 1 traceability annotation. Add '*Traceability: Anchored to User Story 1 (Download and Parse Knot Data from Knot Atlas) per FR-001 filtering requirements*' similar to other FRs.

SC-006 references 'Phase 2+ when additional invariants are computed' but FR-003's exploratory status needs clearer SC-006 linkage. Add explicit note: 'Traceability: Exploratory extension of User Story 2 (Establish Measurement Precision) for Phase 2+ scope.'
